nws.name: Overnight

nws.name: Tuesday
nws.shortForecast: Mostly Cloudy then Slight Chance Showers And Thunderstorms
nws.detailedForecast: A slight chance of showers and thunderstorms after 4pm. Mostly cloudy. High near 83, with temperatures falling to around 81 in the afternoon. South wind around 15 mph, with gusts as high as 30 mph. Chance of precipitation is 20%.

nws.name: Tuesday Night
nws.detailedForecast: A chance of showers and thunderstorms. Mostly cloudy. Low around 67, with temperatures rising to around 69 overnight. South wind around 15 mph, with gusts as high as 30 mph. Chance of precipitation is 50%. New rainfall amounts less than a tenth of an inch possible.

nws.name: Wednesday
nws.detailedForecast: A chance of showers and thunderstorms before 7am, then a chance of showers and thunderstorms between 7am and 1pm, then a chance of showers and thunderstorms. Cloudy. High near 80, with temperatures falling to around 78 in the afternoon. South wind around 15 mph, with gusts as high as 25 mph. Chance of precipitation is 50%. New rainfall amounts between a tenth and quarter of an inch possible.
